objects.prompt: VIEW TOP DOWN 2D "64x64 pixel art game asset (downscaled to 64x64). Perspective: Low top-down view (facing South). Style: Stardew Valley-meets-Cyberpunk urban aesthetic. A compact, weathered market stall used for commerce in a Tokyo-NY alley. The stall features a colorful, slightly torn fabric awning, a wooden counter with small display boxes, and urban details like a metal lamp or a small neon sign on the side. Gritty industrial textures, clean pixel outlines. Isolated on a neutral background. Seamless style."
